title: BSNL JTO Vacancy 2026, Apply Online for 100 Junior Telecom Officer Posts, Notifcation Out -
short_info: BSNL JTO Vacancy 2026: Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL), a Government of India enterprise, has issued a notification for the position of Junior Telecom Officer – Direct Recruitment (Telecom) [JTO(T)-DR]. The recruitment drive comprises 100 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 03-07-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the BSNL JTO Vacancy 2026recruitment is provided below.
